purpose: Refactor /project command to follow standard phased workflow

tasks.title: Refactor project-agent to generate research report instead of timeline
tasks.description: Currently project-agent directly generates the timeline Typst file during research phase. Refactor it to follow the standard pattern: gather project data through forcing questions and output a research report (not the final timeline). The research report should contain all gathered WBS data, PERT estimates, resource allocation data in a format that the planner-agent can use to create an implementation plan.

tasks.title: Update skill-project for research-only workflow
tasks.description: Modify skill-project to route to project-agent for research (creating research report at specs/{NNN}_{SLUG}/reports/), then stop at [RESEARCHED] status. Remove the timeline generation and PLANNED/TRACKED/REPORTED status handling from this skill - those will be handled by founder-implement-agent during /implement.

tasks.title: Create project-specific planning context for planner-agent
tasks.description: Create context file that teaches planner-agent how to create implementation plans for project timeline tasks. The plan should have phases for: (1) Timeline structure generation, (2) PERT calculations and critical path, (3) Resource allocation matrix, (4) Gantt chart and visualization. This enables /plan to work with project tasks.

tasks.title: Extend founder-implement-agent for project timeline generation
tasks.description: Add project timeline generation capability to founder-implement-agent (or create project-implement-agent if cleaner). This agent should read the implementation plan, use the research data, and generate the final Typst timeline file at strategy/timelines/{project-slug}.typ. Handle PLAN/TRACK/REPORT modes here instead of in skill-project.

tasks.title: Update /project command documentation and workflow
tasks.description: Update project.md command to reflect the new standard workflow: (1) Ask forcing questions and create task at [NOT STARTED], (2) Guide user to run /research for research phase, (3) Guide user to run /plan for planning phase, (4) Guide user to run /implement for timeline generation. Update Workflow Summary section and examples.

workflow_summary: After completion, /project will follow the same pattern as /market, /analyze, /strategy, and /legal: create task -> /research -> /plan -> /implement
